
```{r}
data1 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(patient_1 %in% c(14, 32, 34, 36)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(patient_1, rbc_antibodies, 
                allo_ab_1_yes_0_no, 
                h_o_rbc_alloantibodies,
                h_o_rbc_autoantibodies) %>% 
  flextable::flextable()
```

```{r}
BD_RCE <- read_excel("./BD/Y25M02D23_BD.xlsx",
                     sheet = 'Master RCE Info')

tab2_names <- 
  data.frame(Names = names(BD_RCE),
             Code_Names = janitor::make_clean_names(names(BD_RCE)))

data2 <- BD_RCE 
names(data2) <- tab2_names$Code_Names

data2 <- data2 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(patient_id != '52')

tab2_names <- 
  tab2_names %>% 
  tibble::add_row(
    Names = 'difference between procedure times',
    Code_Names = 'DIFF_Between_RCE'
  )
```

- Identificar número total de pacientes e de procedimentos realizados.

Número total de pacientes $n_{Patient} = 65$

```{r}
# length(unique(data1$patient_1))
data2 %>% 
  dplyr::count(patient_id) %>% 
  dplyr::select(!patient_id) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    label = list(n ~ 'n de procedimentos realizados'),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = where(is.numeric) ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                      '{min} | {median} | {max}')
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() 
```

Identificar pacientes que receberam somente um único procedimento. Estes pacientes serão excluídos. Montar tabela com ID de pacientes que foram excluídos. Lembrar que estes pacientes serão excluídos de todos os Sheets do Excel

Apenas o ID 52

```{r}
data2 %>% 
  dplyr::count(patient_id) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(patient_id, -n), y = n)) +
  geom_col() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = 'Patient ID',
       y = 'Count') +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 15) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, col = 'red') +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(colour = 'black')) +
  coord_flip()
```

Identificar pacientes que receberam transfusão simples ou RCE de emergência entre os procedimentos. Em um primeiro momento, não vamos exclui-los, vamos somente quantificar quantos pacientes preenchem este critério e quantos procedimentos estão associados com essas transfusões simples/RCE de emergência.

```{r}
#back
sub_data <- 
  data2 %>% 
  dplyr::select(patient_id, 
                simple_rbc_transfusion_since_previous_rce,
                urgent_emergent_rce_since_previous_rce) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(simple_rbc_transfusion_since_previous_rce == 'Yes' | 
                  urgent_emergent_rce_since_previous_rce == 'Yes')

#front
sub_data %>% 
  flextable::flextable() %>% 
  flextable::theme_vanilla() %>% 
  flextable::set_caption(caption = paste('Patient n =', 
                                         unique(sub_data$patient_id) %>% length())) 
```

Identificar o numero de pacientes que desenvolveram novos anticorpos ao longo dos procedimentos.

```{r}
#back
sub_data <- 
  data2 %>% 
  dplyr::select(patient_id, 
                pre_rce_type_screen_new_rbc_alloantibodies,
                if_yes_select_all_that_apply) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(pre_rce_type_screen_new_rbc_alloantibodies == 'Yes')

#front
sub_data %>% 
  flextable::flextable() %>% 
  flextable::theme_vanilla() %>% 
  flextable::set_caption(caption = paste('Patient n =', 
                                         unique(sub_data$patient_id) %>% length())) 
```

# Descriptive Statistic

## Study Cohort Characterics

### Total

```{r}
data1 %>% 
  dplyr::select(age_years_2, 
                height_cm_5,
                weight_kg_6) %>% 
  # dplyr::group_by(rbc_antibodies) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    label = list(
      age_years_2 ~ 'Age',
      height_cm_5 ~ 'Height (cm)',
      weight_kg_6 ~ 'Weight (kg)'
    ),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla()
```

```{r}
data1 %>% 
  dplyr::select(sex_3, 
                race_4, 
                scd_genotype_7_RECAT,
                abo_group_11, 
                d_status_12,
                h_o_surgical_splenectomy,
                h_o_hepatomegaly_splenomegaly,
  ) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(ABO_Groups_D = paste('G:', abo_group_11, ' - ', 
                                     d_status_12, sep = '')) %>% 
  dplyr::select(!c(abo_group_11, d_status_12)) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    label = list(
      sex_3 ~ 'Gender',
      race_4 ~ 'Race',
      scd_genotype_7_RECAT ~ 'SCD Genotype (New)',
      ABO_Groups_D ~ 'ABO Group',
      h_o_surgical_splenectomy ~ 'Splenectomy (%)',
      h_o_hepatomegaly_splenomegaly ~ 'Splenomegaly or Hepatomegaly (%)'
    ),
    type = where(is.character) ~ 'categorical',
    digits = everything() ~ 1
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla()
```

### Stratified Yes-RBC antibodies vs. No-RBC antibodies

```{r}
data1 %>% 
  dplyr::select(rbc_antibodies, age_years_2, height_cm_5,
                weight_kg_6) %>% 
  # dplyr::group_by(rbc_antibodies) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    by = rbc_antibodies,
    label = list(
      age_years_2 ~ 'Age',
      height_cm_5 ~ 'Height (cm)',
      weight_kg_6 ~ 'Weight (kg)'
    ),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::add_p(pvalue_fun = label_style_pvalue(digits = 2)) %>% 
  gtsummary::modify_header(label = "**RBC antibodies**") %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla()
```

```{r}
data1 %>% 
  dplyr::select(rbc_antibodies, 
                sex_3, 
                race_4, 
                scd_genotype_7_RECAT,
                abo_group_11, 
                d_status_12,
                h_o_surgical_splenectomy,
                h_o_hepatomegaly_splenomegaly,
  ) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(ABO_Groups_D = paste('G:', abo_group_11, ' - ', 
                                     d_status_12, sep = '')) %>% 
  dplyr::select(!c(abo_group_11, d_status_12)) %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(rbc_antibodies) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    label = list(
      sex_3 ~ 'Gender',
      race_4 ~ 'Race',
      scd_genotype_7_RECAT ~ 'SCD Genotype',
      ABO_Groups_D ~ 'ABO Group',
      h_o_surgical_splenectomy ~ 'Splenectomy (%)',
      h_o_hepatomegaly_splenomegaly ~ 'Splenomegaly or Hepatomegaly (%)'
    ),
    type = where(is.character) ~ 'categorical',
    digits = everything() ~ 1,
    by = rbc_antibodies) %>% 
  gtsummary::add_p(test = all_categorical() ~ 'fisher.test',
                   pvalue_fun = label_style_pvalue(digits = 2)) %>% 
  gtsummary::modify_header(label = "**RBC antibodies**") %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() 
```

## ED Coding analysis

```{r}
BD3_ED <- read_excel("./BD/Y25M02D23_BD.xlsx", sheet = 'ED Coding') 

tab3_names <- 
  data.frame(Names = names(BD3_ED),
             Code_Names = janitor::make_clean_names(names(BD3_ED)))

data3_ED <- BD3_ED
names(data3_ED) <- tab3_names$Code_Names

data3_ED_2 <-
  data3_ED %>% 
  tidyr::fill(patient_id, .direction = 'down') %>% 
  dplyr::select(!data_of_rce) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(across(!patient_id, ~ .x %>% as.character)) %>% 
  tidyr::pivot_longer(!patient_id) %>% 
  tidyr::drop_na(value) %>% 
  dplyr::count(patient_id) %>% 
  magrittr::set_colnames(c('patient_id', 'count_EDvisits')) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(patient_id != '52')
```

```{r}
data1 %>% 
  dplyr::select(patient_1, rbc_antibodies) %>% 
  dplyr::left_join(data3_ED_2,
                   by = join_by('patient_1' == 'patient_id')) %>% 
  dplyr::select(!c(patient_1, rbc_antibodies)) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    label = list(count_EDvisits ~ '# ED visits'),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() 
```

```{r}
data1 %>% 
  dplyr::select(patient_1, rbc_antibodies) %>% 
  dplyr::left_join(data3_ED_2,
                   by = join_by('patient_1' == 'patient_id')) %>% 
  dplyr::select(!c(patient_1)) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    by = rbc_antibodies,
    label = list(count_EDvisits ~ '# ED visits'),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::add_p(pvalue_fun = label_style_pvalue(digits = 2)) %>% 
  gtsummary::modify_header(label = "**RBC antibodies**") %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() 
```

## Hospital Admissions Coding analysis

```{r}
BD4_HAC <- read_excel("./BD/Y25M02D23_BD.xlsx", sheet = 'Hospital Admissions Coding')

tab4_names <- 
  data.frame(Names = names(BD4_HAC),
             Code_Names = janitor::make_clean_names(names(BD4_HAC)))

data4_HAC <- BD4_HAC 
names(data4_HAC) <- tab4_names$Code_Names

data4_ED_2 <-
  data4_HAC %>% 
  tidyr::fill(patient_id, .direction = 'down') %>% 
  dplyr::select(!data_of_rce) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(across(!patient_id, ~ .x %>% as.character)) %>% 
  tidyr::pivot_longer(!patient_id) %>% 
  tidyr::drop_na(value) %>% 
  dplyr::count(patient_id) %>% 
  magrittr::set_colnames(c('patient_id', 'count_Hospitalizations')) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(patient_id != '52')
```

```{r}
data1 %>% 
  dplyr::select(patient_1, rbc_antibodies) %>% 
  dplyr::left_join(data4_ED_2,
                   by = join_by('patient_1' == 'patient_id')) %>% 
  dplyr::select(!c(patient_1, rbc_antibodies)) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    label = list(count_Hospitalizations ~ '# Hospitalizations'),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla()
```

```{r}
data1 %>% 
  dplyr::select(patient_1, rbc_antibodies) %>% 
  dplyr::left_join(data4_ED_2,
                   by = join_by('patient_1' == 'patient_id')) %>% 
  dplyr::select(!c(patient_1)) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    by = rbc_antibodies,
    label = list(count_Hospitalizations ~ '# Hospitalizations'),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::add_p(pvalue_fun = label_style_pvalue(digits = 2)) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::modify_header(label = "**RBC antibodies**") %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() 
```

# Coorte do estudo

- Excluindo o paciente 52;

- Excluindo procedimentos que tiveram Transfusão simples de hemácias desde RCE anterior ( _Simple RBC Transfusion Since Previous RCE?_ );

```{r}
names_tab <- 
  tab2_names %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Code_Names %in% c('patient_id', 
                                  'date_of_rce',
                                  'simple_rbc_transfusion_since_previous_rce'))

data2 %>% 
  dplyr::select(patient_id,
                date_of_rce,
                simple_rbc_transfusion_since_previous_rce) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(date_of_rce = ymd(date_of_rce)) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(simple_rbc_transfusion_since_previous_rce == 'Yes' |
                  is.na(simple_rbc_transfusion_since_previous_rce)) %>% 
  magrittr::set_colnames(names_tab$Names) %>% 
  flextable::flextable() %>% 
  flextable::theme_vanilla() %>% 
  flextable::width(j = 1:3, width = c(.2, 1, 1))

#atualização dos dados
data2_v2 <- data2 %>% 
  dplyr::filter(simple_rbc_transfusion_since_previous_rce == 'No') %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(date_of_rce = lubridate::ymd(date_of_rce)) 
```

Temos 65 pacientes, e 1.307 procedimentos

```{r}
data2_v2 %>% 
  dplyr::count(patient_id) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(-n) %>% 
  flextable::flextable() %>% 
  flextable::theme_vanilla() %>% 
  flextable::set_caption(caption = paste('Frequência dos procedimentos pelos 65 pacientes - Totalizando 1307 procedimentos (sem filtro de Delta Hba)')) %>% 
  flextable::width(width = c(.1, .2))
```

# Análises considerando DeltaHbA (%)

Casos que foram excluidos pois não apresentagem valores para preHbA (Coluna AC) e/ou posHbA (Coluna AM)

```{r}
data2_v2 %>% 
  #Master RCE Info
  dplyr::select(
    patient_id, #Patient ID
    date_of_rce, #Date of RCE
    # days_between_exchanges,s #Days between exchanges
    pre_a_percent, #Pre A %
    post_a_percent #Post A %
  ) %>% 
  dplyr::filter(pre_a_percent == 'not assessed' | 
                  post_a_percent == 'not assessed' | 
                  pre_a_percent == 'Not assessed' | 
                  post_a_percent == 'Not assessed' | 
                  post_a_percent == 'N/A') %>% 
  flextable::flextable() %>% 
  flextable::theme_vanilla() %>% 
  flextable::width(width = 1.2) %>% 
  flextable::set_caption(caption = 'Tabela de procedimentos sem mensuração na coluna de preHbA ou posHba')
```

Número total de procedimentos RCE presentes em nossa corte que possuem ambos o preHbA e posHbA mensurados

```{r}
data_deltahba_porc <-
  data2_v2 %>% 
  # #Master RCE Info
  # dplyr::select(
  #   patient_id, #Patient ID
  #   date_of_rce, #Date of RCE
  #   # days_between_exchanges,s #Days between exchanges
  #   pre_a_percent, #Pre A %
  #   post_a_percent #Post A %
  # ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(c(pre_a_percent, post_a_percent), 
                       ~ .x %>% stringr::str_to_lower())) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(across(c(pre_a_percent, post_a_percent),
                       ~ if_else(.x == 'not assessed', NA, .x))) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(across(c(pre_a_percent, post_a_percent),
                       ~ .x %>% as.numeric())) %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(patient_id) %>% 
  tidyr::drop_na(pre_a_percent, post_a_percent) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(RCE_Procedure = row_number()) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(RCE_Procedure = paste('Procedure', RCE_Procedure, sep = '')) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(RCE_Procedure = factor(RCE_Procedure, 
                                       levels = paste('Procedure', 1:53, sep = ''))) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(DIFF_Between_RCE = as.numeric(date_of_rce - lag(date_of_rce))) %>%  #cálculo entre data de RCE para cada paciente
  dplyr::mutate(
    DeltaHbA = ((post_a_percent - lead(pre_a_percent))/lead(DIFF_Between_RCE))*28
  ) %>% 
  dplyr::ungroup()
```

```{r}
data_deltahba_porc %>% 
  dplyr::select(DIFF_Between_RCE) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = where(is.numeric) ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                      '{min} | {median} | {max}')
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() %>% 
  flextable::set_caption(caption = 'Tabela descritiva para Diferença entre da data de procedimentos')
```

```{r}
data_deltahba_porc %>%
  dplyr::count(patient_id) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(-n) %>% 
  flextable::flextable() %>% 
  flextable::theme_vanilla() %>% 
  flextable::set_caption(caption = paste('Frequência dos procedimentos pelos 65 pacientes - Totalizando 1294 procedimentos (com filtro de Delta HbA Porcentagem)')) %>% 
  flextable::width(width = c(1, 1))
```

Tamanho da coorte filtando os procedimentos que não possuiam valores de preHbA (Coluna AC) e/ou posHbA (Coluna AM). Para os 65 pacientes com a quantidade de 1294 procedimentos.

Boxplot ordenado pela mediana

```{r, fig.width=20}
levels_recordid <- 
  data_deltahba_porc %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(patient_id) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(median_DeltaHbA = median(DeltaHbA, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(median_DeltaHbA) %>% 
  magrittr::extract2('patient_id')

data_deltahba_porc %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(patient_id = factor(patient_id, levels = levels_recordid)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = patient_id, y = DeltaHbA)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(color = 'black')) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 25, minor_breaks = NULL)
```

Boxplot ordenado pela variância

```{r, fig.width=20}
levels_recordid <-
  data_deltahba_porc %>%
  dplyr::group_by(patient_id) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(var_DeltaHbA = var(DeltaHbA, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(desc(is.na(var_DeltaHbA)), var_DeltaHbA) %>% 
  magrittr::extract2('patient_id')

data_deltahba_porc %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(patient_id = factor(patient_id, levels = levels_recordid)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = patient_id, y = DeltaHbA)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(color = 'black')) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 25, minor_breaks = NULL)
```

## Identificando o valor de Delta HbA para aqueles que apresentam aloanticorpos para hemácia

```{r}
id_selected <- 
  data_deltahba_porc %>% 
  dplyr::filter(pre_rce_type_screen_new_rbc_alloantibodies == 'Yes') %>% 
  magrittr::extract2('patient_id')

data_selected_3 <-
  data_deltahba_porc %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(patient_id) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(RCE_Procedure = row_number()) %>%
  dplyr::filter(pre_rce_type_screen_new_rbc_alloantibodies == 'Yes') %>% 
  dplyr::select(patient_id, RCE_Procedure) %>%
  slice_head(n = 1)

data_prepos_alloantibodies <-
  data_deltahba_porc %>% 
  dplyr::filter(patient_id %in% id_selected) %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(patient_id) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(RCE_Procedure = row_number()) %>%
  tidyr::nest() %>% 
  dplyr::left_join(data_selected_3) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(data_change = purrr::map2(.x = data,
                                          .y = RCE_Procedure,
                                          .f = ~ .x %>% 
                                            dplyr::mutate(Change_Alloantibodies = 
                                                            if_else(
                                                              RCE_Procedure >= .y,
                                                              'Pos',
                                                              'Pre'
                                                            )))) %>% 
  dplyr::select(!c(data, RCE_Procedure)) %>% 
  tidyr::unnest(everything())
```

```{r, fig.width=20}
levels_recordid <- 
  data_deltahba_porc %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(patient_id) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(median_DeltaHbA = median(DeltaHbA, na.rm = T)) %>% 
  dplyr::arrange(median_DeltaHbA) %>% 
  magrittr::extract2('patient_id')

data_prepos_alloantibodies %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(patient_id = factor(patient_id, levels = levels_recordid)) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(Change_Alloantibodies = factor(Change_Alloantibodies, 
                                               levels = c('Pre', 'Pos'),
                                               labels = c('Prior', 'Post'))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = patient_id, y = DeltaHbA,
             fill = Change_Alloantibodies)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(color = 'black')) +
  scale_y_continuous(n.breaks = 25, minor_breaks = NULL)
```

## Análise para rbc_antibodies (RBC Autoantibodies)

```{r}
data_mixedmodels <-
  data_deltahba_porc %>%
  #Master RCE Info
  dplyr::select(
    patient_id, #Patient ID
    date_of_rce, #Date of RCE
    RCE_Procedure,
    pre_a_percent, #Pre A %
    post_a_percent, #Post A %
    goal_target_post_rce_hct_percent, #Goal/Target Post-RCE HCT (%)
    goal_target_post_rce_hb_s_percent, #Goal/Target Post-RCE HbS (%)
    pre_rce_hb_g_d_l, #Pre-RCE Hb (g/dL)
    pre_rce_hb_s_percent, #Pre-RCE HbS (%)
    pre_rce_type_screen_new_rbc_alloantibodies,
    post_rce_hb_g_d_l, #Post-RCE Hb (g/dL)
    post_rce_hb_s_percent, #Post-RCE HbS (%)
    # Fri Dec 12 14:41:21 2025 ------------------------------
    DIFF_Between_RCE #adicionar variável
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(data1 %>% 
                     dplyr::select(patient_1, 
                                   rbc_antibodies),
                   by = join_by(patient_id == patient_1)) %>%
  # dplyr::select(patient_id, RCE_Procedure, rbc_antibodies, pre_rce_hb_s_percent) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(patient_id = as.factor(patient_id),
                rbc_antibodies = as.factor(rbc_antibodies)) %>% 
  dplyr::ungroup()
```

## Estatística Total

```{r}
names_var <- c(
  'goal_target_post_rce_hct_percent', #Goal/Target Post-RCE HCT (%)
  'goal_target_post_rce_hb_s_percent', #Goal/Target Post-RCE HbS (%)
  'pre_rce_hb_g_d_l', #Pre-RCE Hb (g/dL)
  'pre_rce_hb_s_percent', #Pre-RCE HbS (%)
  'pre_a_percent', #Pre A %
  'post_rce_hb_g_d_l', #Post-RCE Hb (g/dL)
  'post_rce_hb_s_percent', #Post-RCE HbS (%)
  'post_a_percent', #Post A %
  'DIFF_Between_RCE'
)

tab2_names %>% 
  dplyr::filter(Code_Names %in% names_var)

data_mixedmodels <- 
  data_mixedmodels %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(across(names_var, ~ .x %>% as.numeric())) 

data_mixedmodels %>% 
  dplyr::select(names_var) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    label = list(
      goal_target_post_rce_hct_percent ~ 'Goal/Target Post-RCE HCT (%)',
      goal_target_post_rce_hb_s_percent ~ 'Goal/Target Post-RCE HbS (%)',
      pre_rce_hb_g_d_l ~ 'Pre-RCE Hb (g/dL)',
      pre_a_percent ~ 'Pre A %',
      pre_rce_hb_s_percent ~ 'Pre-RCE HbS (%)',
      post_rce_hb_g_d_l ~ 'Post-RCE Hb (g/dL)',
      post_a_percent ~ 'Post A %',
      post_rce_hb_s_percent ~ 'Post-RCE HbS (%)'
    ),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() 
```

## Comparação por RBC Antibodies

```{r, results='asis', warning=FALSE}
mixed_table <- function(variables) {
  # variables = names_var[8]
  
  eq_fit <- 
    paste(variables, 
          '~  rbc_antibodies + (1 | patient_id)') %>% 
    as.formula()
  
  model <- lmerTest::lmer(formula = eq_fit, data = data_mixedmodels)
  
  model
  
  pvalue_fit <- summary(model)$coefficients[2, 'Pr(>|t|)']
  
  emans_fit <- 
    emmeans::emmeans(model, ~ rbc_antibodies) %>% 
    summary() %>% 
    {.[,1:3]}
  
  output_list <- list(
    tab2_names[tab2_names$Code_Names == variables, ],
    'Estimation mean least' = emans_fit, 'p-value' = pvalue_fit)
  
  output_list %>% 
    as.data.frame() %>% 
    flextable::flextable() %>% 
    flextable::merge_v() %>% 
    flextable::theme_vanilla()  %>% 
    # print()
    flextable::flextable_to_rmd()
}

purrr::map(.x = names_var,
           .f = ~ mixed_table(.x))
```

## Nomograma 

```{r}
data_deltahba_porc %>%
  #Master RCE Info
  dplyr::select(
    patient_id, #Patient ID
    date_of_rce, #Date of RCE
    dhtr_likelihood_nomogram_results
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(data1 %>% 
                     dplyr::select(patient_1, 
                                   rbc_antibodies),
                   by = join_by(patient_id == patient_1)) %>%
  dplyr::select(dhtr_likelihood_nomogram_results) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(dhtr_likelihood_nomogram_results = dhtr_likelihood_nomogram_results %>% 
                  as.factor() %>% 
                  forcats::fct_na_level_to_value('N/A')) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() 

data_deltahba_porc %>%
  #Master RCE Info
  dplyr::select(
    patient_id, #Patient ID
    date_of_rce, #Date of RCE
    dhtr_likelihood_nomogram_results
  ) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(data1 %>% 
                     dplyr::select(patient_1, 
                                   rbc_antibodies),
                   by = join_by(patient_id == patient_1)) %>%
  dplyr::select(rbc_antibodies, dhtr_likelihood_nomogram_results) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(dhtr_likelihood_nomogram_results = dhtr_likelihood_nomogram_results %>% 
                  as.factor() %>% 
                  forcats::fct_na_level_to_value('N/A')) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    by = rbc_antibodies,
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::add_p(pvalue_fun = label_style_pvalue(digits = 2)) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() 
```

## Planilha **DataAdditional**

### Age Unit

```{r}
DataAdditional <- 
  read_excel("./BD/DataAdditional.xlsx", sheet = "Age Unit") %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(TMS_DATEOFTRNSFSN = lubridate::ymd(TMS_DATEOFTRNSFSN))

tab5_names <- 
  data.frame(Names = names(DataAdditional),
             Code_Names = janitor::make_clean_names(names(DataAdditional)))

data_addi <- DataAdditional
names(data_addi) <- tab5_names$Code_Names
```

Juntando a coorte com a planilha de *Age Unit* e excluindo os casos que não possuem procedimentos pré ou pos

```{r}
data_inner_age <- 
  data_addi %>% 
  dplyr::right_join(data_deltahba_porc %>% 
                      dplyr::select(patient_id, date_of_rce),
                    by = join_by(tms_patnum == patient_id,
                                 tms_dateoftrnsfsn == date_of_rce)) 
```

```{r}
data_inner_age %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(tms_patnum) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(mean_age_unit = mean(age_of_unit)) %>% 
  dplyr::inner_join(data1 %>% dplyr::select(patient_1, rbc_antibodies),
                    by = join_by(tms_patnum == patient_1)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(!c(tms_patnum, rbc_antibodies)) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    label = list(mean_age_unit ~ 'Mean Age of Unit by Patient'),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() 
```

```{r}
data_inner_age %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(tms_patnum) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(mean_age_unit = mean(age_of_unit)) %>% 
  dplyr::inner_join(data1 %>% dplyr::select(patient_1, rbc_antibodies),
                    by = join_by(tms_patnum == patient_1)) %>% 
  dplyr::select(!c(tms_patnum)) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    by = rbc_antibodies,
    label = list(mean_age_unit ~ 'Mean Age of Unit by Patient'),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::add_p(pvalue_fun = label_style_pvalue(digits = 2)) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::modify_header(label = "**RBC antibodies**") %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() 
```

### ED Coding

```{r}
DataAdditional2 <- read_excel("./BD/DataAdditional.xlsx", sheet = "ED Coding") 

tab6_names <- 
  data.frame(Names = names(DataAdditional2),
             Code_Names = janitor::make_clean_names(names(DataAdditional2)))

data_addi2 <- DataAdditional2
names(data_addi2) <- tab6_names$Code_Names
```

```{r}
data_count_ed <-
  data_addi2 %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(data_of_rce = lubridate::ymd(data_of_rce)) %>% 
  tidyr::fill(patient_id, .direction = 'down') %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(across(!c(patient_id, data_of_rce), 
                       ~ .x %>% as.character())) %>% 
  tidyr::pivot_longer(!c(patient_id, data_of_rce)) %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(patient_id, data_of_rce) %>% 
  
  tidyr::nest() %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(
    count_edcoding = purrr::map(
      .x = data,
      .f = ~ .x %>% 
        tidyr::drop_na(value) %>% 
        nrow()
    )
  ) %>% 
  dplyr::select(!data) %>% 
  tidyr::unnest() %>% 
  dplyr::ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::inner_join(data_deltahba_porc %>% 
                      dplyr::select(patient_id, date_of_rce) %>% 
                      dplyr::mutate(date_of_rce = ymd(date_of_rce)),
                    by = join_by(patient_id == patient_id,
                                 data_of_rce == date_of_rce))
```

```{r}
data_count_ed %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(patient_id) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(count_ED = sum(count_edcoding)) %>% 
  dplyr::inner_join(data1 %>% dplyr::select(patient_1, rbc_antibodies),
                    by = join_by(patient_id == patient_1)) %>% 
  dplyr::ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::select(count_ED) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    label = list(count_ED ~ 'Count ED Coding by Patient'),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla()
```

```{r}
data_count_ed %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(patient_id) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(count_ED = sum(count_edcoding)) %>% 
  dplyr::inner_join(data1 %>% dplyr::select(patient_1, rbc_antibodies),
                    by = join_by(patient_id == patient_1)) %>% 
  dplyr::ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::select(count_ED, rbc_antibodies) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    by = rbc_antibodies,
    label = list(count_ED ~ 'Count ED Coding by Patient'),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::add_p(pvalue_fun = label_style_pvalue(digits = 2)) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::modify_header(label = "**RBC antibodies**") %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() 
```

### Hospital Admission

```{r}
DataAdditional3 <- read_excel("./BD/DataAdditional.xlsx", 
                              sheet = "Hospital Admission") 

tab7_names <- 
  data.frame(Names = names(DataAdditional3),
             Code_Names = janitor::make_clean_names(names(DataAdditional3)))

data_addi3 <- DataAdditional3
names(data_addi3) <- tab7_names$Code_Names
```

Organizando o banco

```{r}
data_count_admi <- 
  data_addi3 %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(data_of_rce = lubridate::ymd(data_of_rce)) %>% 
  tidyr::fill(patient_id, .direction = 'down') %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(across(!c(patient_id, data_of_rce), ~ .x %>% as.character())) %>% 
  tidyr::pivot_longer(!c(patient_id, data_of_rce)) %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(patient_id, data_of_rce) %>% 
  tidyr::nest() %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(
    count_admi = purrr::map(
      .x = data,
      .f = ~ .x %>% 
        tidyr::drop_na(value) %>% 
        nrow()
    )
  ) %>% 
  dplyr::select(!data) %>% 
  tidyr::unnest() %>% 
  dplyr::ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::inner_join(data_deltahba_porc %>% 
                      dplyr::select(patient_id, date_of_rce),
                    by = join_by('patient_id' == 'patient_id',
                                 'data_of_rce' == 'date_of_rce')) 
```

```{r}
data_count_admi %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(patient_id) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(count_AD = sum(count_admi)) %>% 
  dplyr::ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::select(count_AD) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    label = list(count_AD ~ 'Count Hospital Admission by Patient'),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla() 
```

```{r}
data_count_admi %>% 
  dplyr::group_by(patient_id) %>% 
  dplyr::summarise(count_AD = sum(count_admi)) %>% 
  dplyr::inner_join(data1 %>% dplyr::select(patient_1, rbc_antibodies),
                    by = join_by(patient_id == patient_1)) %>% 
  dplyr::ungroup() %>% 
  dplyr::select(count_AD, rbc_antibodies) %>% 
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    by = rbc_antibodies,
    label = list(count_AD ~ 'Count Hospital Admission by Patient'),
    type = where(is.numeric) ~ 'continuous2',
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ c('{mean} ({sd})',
                                          '{median}',
                                          '{min} - {max}',
                                          '{p25} - {p75}'))
  ) %>% 
  gtsummary::add_p(pvalue_fun = label_style_pvalue(digits = 2)) %>% 
  gtsummary::bold_labels() %>% 
  gtsummary::modify_header(label = "**RBC antibodies**") %>% 
  gtsummary::as_flex_table() %>%
  flextable::theme_vanilla()
```

<!--              Code_Names = janitor::make_clean_names(names(BD_HbC_Units))) -->

<!-- data_HbC_merge <- -->
<!--   data2 %>% -->
<!--   dplyr::select(patient_id, -->
<!--                 rce_procedure_number, -->
<!--                 date_of_rce) %>% -->
